title: Brad-seq mRNA (for Shotgun or DGE)

steps: Add 5 µL of 2-Mercaptoethanol (2-ME) to 1 mL of LBB (for ratio, adjust it for the amount LBB used)
Wipe off RNAlatter from tissue; Place 20 mg of tissue in crushing tube with metal cone
Add 200 µL, (100/10: LBB/Tissue ratio) in tube
Crush sample with multi-beads shocker at 2000 rpm, °C, , 2-4 times
Sit in Room temperature for 00:05:00 and remove metal cone
Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, 1 minute
Transfer all the lysate to a new 1.5 mL tube
Centrifuge at 14000 rpm, °C, 10 minutes
Carefully transfer the supernatant to a new tube. Be careful not to carry over cell debris Stop here and store samples in -80 °C if needed
Put 100 µL lysed sample in each well of 8-strip (Keep another half in -80 °C just in case)
Add 2 µL, (6.25 µm) of biotin-20nt-20T oligo; Mix well by pipetting
Sit in Room temperature for 00:10:00 for incubation
While waiting, prepare NEB magnetic Streptavidin beads Resuspend beads well before use
Dispense 20 µL of Streptavidin beads into each well of a 8-strip ( 1 mg : 1 µL beads/tissue ratio); Put 8-strip on magnetic rack and remove supernatant
Resuspend beads with 100 µL LBB to wash the beads; Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant Beads are ready for use
Add biotin-incubated samples to washed beads
Slowly stir at Room temperature at 500 rpm, °C, for 00:10:00
Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant If DNA is needed, keep the supernatant 2-ME in the solution
Wash with 150 µL of cold WBA (keep it as cool as possible) and Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant
Wash with 150 µL of cold WBB (keep it as cool as possible) and Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant
Wash with 150 µL of cold LSB (keep it as cool as possible) and Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant
RNA elution buffer prep. %s %s
Resuspend beads in 17 µL RNA elution buffer
Warm at 80 °C for 00:02:00 in a thermal cycler. After that, cool it quickly on ice for 00:05:00 Keep TTT away from AAA
Place 8-strip on magnet rack and transfer supernatant ( 17 µL ) to a new 8-strip Supernatant here is GOOD for DGE protocol
DNAase treatment for Secondary mRNA Recovery (for SHO protocol)
RNase-Free DNase Set Qiagen Catalog #79254 DANase prep. %s %s
Add 2.31 µL DNAase to 1st RNA supernatant ( 17 µL ) = 19.31 µL in total
Sit at Room temperature for 00:15:00
Kill the activity of DNAase at 70 °C for 00:10:00
Add 150 µL DEPC water to re-suspend the used beads; Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant
Add 5 µL of 2-Mercaptoethanol (2-ME) to 1 mL of SBB (for ratio, adjust it for the amount SBB used)
Add 150 µL SBB and Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant (Wash beads)
Add in DNAase treated RNA ( 19.31 µL ) to the washed beads + 130 µL SBB
Sit at Room temperature for 00:10:00
Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant
Wash with 150 µL of cold WBA (keep it as cool as possible) and Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant
Wash with 150 µL of cold WBB (keep it as cool as possible) and Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant
Wash with 150 µL of cold LSB (keep it as cool as possible) and Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant
Resuspend beads in 17 µL RNA elution buffer
Warm at 80 °C for 00:02:00 in a thermal cycler. After that, cool it quickly on ice for 00:05:00 Keep TTT away from AAA
Place 8-strip on magnet rack and transfer supernatant ( 17 µL ) to a new 8-strip Supernatant here is GOOD for SHO protocol Can be stored at -20 °C if needed
Make 3 strand priming 2.5 µL %s %s
Mix 2.5 µL 3 strand priming with 7.5 µL extracted RNA = 10 µL in total Keep the remaining at -20 °C )

10 µL of mixed in thermo cycler for RNA fragmentation Fragmentation/Priming program: for DGE ( 25 °C, 1s , 94 °C, 1.5 min , 30 °C, 1 min , 20 °C, 4 min , 20 °C, hold ) Fragmentation/Priming program: for SHO ( 25 °C, 1s , 94 °C, 1.5 min , 4 °C, 5 min , 4 °C, hold )
5 µL master mix + 10 µL fragmented RNA = 15 µL mixed solution 1st strand master mix %s %s
Mixed solution in thermo cycler for reverse transcription Condition: 25 °C, 10min , 42 °C, 50min , 50 °C, 10min , 70 °C, 10min , 4 °C, hold
Use Ampure beads solution for cDNA purification; 35 µL Ampure bead solution + 20 µL cDNA Ampure bead solution %s %s
Vortex for 00:05:00 at Room temperature
Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant

Wash with 200 µL ethanol without suspending; Dry the pellet Repeat this process twice Don't dry the pellet too much at 2nd time, otherwise it's hard to elute Not recommend to store at -20 °C at this stage
Add 4 µL of 10 μM 5-prime adapter directly to the pellet at Room temperature to resuspend the bead pellet
Prepare the master mix in advance during cDNA synthesis, and add the enzyme just before using 6 µL mater mix/rxn + 4 µL suspended cDNA pellet mater mix recipe %s %s
Sit at Room temperature for 00:15:00
40 µL Ampure bead solution + 10 µL cDNA Ampure bead solution recipe A B 1 Component Volume 2 50 mM EDTA pH 8.0 10 μl 3 Ampure Bead Resuspension Buffer (ABR) 30 μl Ampure bead = 1.5X sample (3:2)
Vortex for 00:05:00 at Room temperature
Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant
Wash with 200 µL ethanol without suspending; Dry the pellet Repeat this process twice Don't dry the pellet too much at 2nd time, otherwise it's hard to elute
Elute the pellet in 20 µL of 10 mM Tris pH 8.0; Let it sit for 00:01:00 12 µL when sample is little
Transfer the supernatant to new tubes
12.2 µL Enrichment master mix + 2 µL 1 μM ILL-INDEX primer + 5.8 µL cDNA Enrichment master mix recipe %s %s

Mixed solution in thermo cycler Condition for SHO 98 °C, 5 min , ( 98 °C, 20 s , 65 °C, 15 s , 72 °C, 15 s ) X 18 cycles , 72 °C, 3 min , 10 °C, hold Condition for DGE 98 °C, 5 min , ( 98 °C, 20 s , 65 °C, 15 s , 72 °C, 15 s ) X 14 cycles , 72 °C, 3 min , 10 °C, hold
24 µL Ampure beads + 20 µL of enrichment product; Mix well
Vortex for 00:05:00 at Room temperature
Place 8-strip on magnet rack and remove supernatant
Wash with 200 µL ethanol without suspending; Dry the pellet Repeat this process twice Don't dry the pellet too much at 2nd time, otherwise it's hard to elute
Elute the pellet in 12 µL of H2O
Use Bioanalyzer for quantification for measuring the concentration of each sample
Mix equimolar of samples in a 1.5 mL tube
Add same amount of AMpure XP as the DNA, mix well, and let it stand for 00:05:00
Place on magnet rack for 00:05:00 , remove supernatant and wash twice with 70 µL 80% EtOH. Dry.
Resuspend the beads by adding 22 µL of water, leave them in the magnet rack for 00:05:00 Transfer the supernatant to a new 0.5 mL low bind tube.
Quantification with Qbit or Bioanalyzer
creator: Yin-Tse Huang
